subject: Re: XinYuan Group Q2 Service Planning
body: Hi Lisa, the Q1 system upgrade worked great -- our efficiency improved by 30%. For Q2, we'd like to discuss expanding to the supply chain module, with a budget of about 1 million yuan. Also, we have no issues with the renewal terms and can sign next week.

subject: System Outage Complaint - Zoomlion Heavy
body: Your system has gone down 3 times this month! The production line data sync interruptions have cost us at least 500,000 yuan. If the stability issues are not resolved before renewal, we will consider switching to another vendor. Please provide a resolution plan immediately.

subject: BYD Electronics - New Factory Deployment Plan
body: Amy, our new factory in Huizhou will begin production in Q3 and requires a full MES system deployment. Preliminary budget is approximately 2 million yuan. Please arrange for the technical team to come next week for a requirements assessment.

subject: Re: Hisense Renewal Negotiation
body: Kevin, frankly we have not been satisfied with the service quality over the past year. Response times are slow and feature iterations don't keep up with our needs. The renewal price needs to be reduced by 20%, otherwise we plan to switch to SAP. We need your final proposal by the end of April.
